summary: Comprehensive backend + frontend testing of GlimmerFall TCG. All 13 pytest backend tests passed (100%). All 8 frontend page/flow checks passed. Server-side turn-limit enforcement (double DRAW, double resonance), state redaction (opp hand hidden, no library key), AI auto-turn advancing turn by 2, Radiant Shield attachment buff+Guard grant, and win condition all verified. Rite terminology in place (no 'Hex' anywhere in cards or rules UI).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py insert_match has a convoluted ternary using 'and' short-circuit for active_name; works but hard to read. Consider explicit conditional.
game_engine.create_tokens sets faction = 'Aether' hardcoded when parsing 'create X/Y token' text; may produce off-faction tokens if that code path fires (not exercised by tested cards).
resolve_effect: 'destroy target' branch relies on tgt_id even for auto=True; a deploy-effect 'destroy target' without a supplied target will silently do nothing.
start_turn does not draw a card automatically — DRAW_CARD is a separate manual step. Consistent with UX (btn-draw) but worth noting for docs.
test_credentials: None required (username 'Tester' used in Arena lobby).
seed_data_creation: No seed data required — DB pre-populated with 100 cards, 4 starter decks, and rulebook sections.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_glimmerfall_backend.py and can be re-run with: pytest backend/tests -v. Frontend tested at REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. All data-testids from the spec resolved correctly. Deep gameplay (multi-turn combat, keyword interactions beyond Radiant Shield) was not exhaustively tested — engine's parser is best-effort per PM note.
